summary: Tested Standings UI Refinement feature. All 8 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Main standings list shows only 'Indovinati X' (no Exact/1X2), User detail page shows 'Statistiche Spareggio' section with 3 tiebreak stats (Indovinati=19, Risultati esatti=0, 1X2 indovinati=14) and tiebreak order note. Admin panel retains all columns.
test_scenarios_verified: 1. GET /api/standings/total returns total_correct_predictions, exact_score_hits, one_x_two_hits - PASS
2. GET /api/standings/user/{userId} returns all three tiebreak fields with correct values - PASS
4. Main standings list shows only 'Indovinati X' without Exact/1X2 - PASS
5. User detail page shows 'Statistiche Spareggio' section - PASS
6. User detail page shows three tiebreak stats with Italian labels - PASS
7. User detail page shows tiebreak order note - PASS
8. Admin panel retains Indovinati/Esatti/1X2 columns - PASS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Standings UI refinement verified. The main list now shows only 'Indovinati X' under player names. User detail page has 'Statistiche Spareggio' section with three tiebreak stats and order note. Note: After code changes, Expo may need a restart for changes to take effect. Token injection via localStorage keys 'access_token', 'refresh_token', 'user' works for Playwright testing.

notes.expo_restart_needed: After frontend code changes, run 'sudo supervisorctl restart expo' and wait ~15s for rebundling
notes.data_testid_issue: data-testid attributes in React Native Web may not be queryable via standard DOM methods but content is present
